title: agrostis castellana subsp. hispanica
intro: Agrostis castellana subsp. hispanica is a plant species commonly known as the Castilian bent or Iberian bentgrass, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis castellana subsp. hispanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
